news.t: Is the Factor Leadership Rotation Finally Here?

holdings.infoBox: NULG is an equity ETF with a total of 70 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 15.12%, Broadcom at 6.04%, Eli Lilly and Company at 3.93%, Advanced Micro Devices at 3.86%, and Applied Materials at 2.96%.

overview.description: The Nuveen ESG Large-Cap Growth ETF (NULG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund tracks an index composed of large-cap US companies with growth characteristics that also meet certain environmental, social, and governance (ESG) criteria. NULG was launched on Dec 13, 2016 and is issued by Nuveen.
infoTable: MSCI Nuveen ESG USA Large Cap Growth

data.title: Is the Factor Leadership Rotation Finally Here?
data.text: While momentum, growth, and high-beta strategies have served as the engines driving quarter-to-date returns for factor ETFs, a subtle shift under the hood suggests a potential factor rotation may be u...
